IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Meta_PosDeductionType]') AND name = N'Meta_PosDeductionType_IX0') CREATE UNIQUE INDEX [Meta_PosDeductionType_IX0] ON [Meta_PosDeductionType] ([PosDeductionTypeCode] ASC) GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [Meta_PosDeductionType] WHERE [PosDeductionTypeCode] = 'UYEIS') INSERT INTO [Meta_PosDeductionType] ([PosDeductionTypeCode],[PosDeductionTypeName],[InUse],[IsDeleted]) VALUES ('UYEIS', N'Üye İşyeri Ücreti', 1, 0) GO IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [Meta_PosDeductionType] WHERE [PosDeductionTypeCode] = 'ODULG') INSERT INTO [Meta_PosDeductionType] ([PosDeductionTypeCode],[PosDeductionTypeName],[InUse],[IsDeleted]) VALUES ('ODULG', N'İşyeri Ödül Gideri', 1, 0) GO IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [Meta_PosDeductionType] WHERE [PosDeductionTypeCode] = 'SERVK') INSERT INTO [Meta_PosDeductionType] ([PosDeductionTypeCode],[PosDeductionTypeName],[InUse],[IsDeleted]) VALUES ('SERVK', N'Servis Komisyonu', 1, 0) GO
